title: Ingestion Record Schema V1
description: System Log record capturing a document ingestion lifecycle: upload, SLM extraction, multi-interpretation review, and commitment. Hash-chained like all System Log records.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this System Log record.

prev_record_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous System Log record in the chain, or 'genesis' for the first record.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of record creation.

document_id.description: Unique identifier for the ingested document.

original_filename.description: Original filename as uploaded by the user.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the raw uploaded document content.

ingesting_actor_id.description: Pseudonymous ID of the user who uploaded the document.

module_id.description: Target module identifier within the domain (optional; may be assigned during review).

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the ingestion.

interpretations.description: SLM-generated YAML interpretation variants. Populated after extraction completes.

selected_interpretation_id.description: ID of the interpretation selected by the reviewer.

reviewer_id.description: Pseudonymous ID of the reviewing domain authority.

committed_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the final committed JSON artifact. Set when status transitions to 'committed'.

id.description: Unique identifier for this interpretation variant.

label.description: Human-readable label describing the interpretation approach.

yaml_content.description: The generated YAML content representing this interpretation.

confidence.description: SLM confidence score for this interpretation.

ambiguity_notes.description: Explanation of what was ambiguous and how this interpretation resolves it.
